Implements TicToc watch app with main function, metadata, graphical rendering, and JavaScript support.

## Folders
- **[default](default/README.md)**: Implements the main function for a TicToc watch app with conditional JavaScript support.
- **[spalding](spalding/README.md)**: Implements a watch application with graphical clock face rendering, text display, and clock model management.

## Files
- **[tictoc.c](tictoc.c.md)**: Defines metadata and entry point for the TicToc watchface application in Pebble firmware.
- **[tictoc.h](tictoc.h.md)**: Header file for the TicToc app, defining its main function and app info retrieval.
